action.reasoning: Observation: Stage 1 with balanced softmax achieved 0.8300 val balanced acc, but was never submitted for eval. Stage 2 cRT degraded to 0.8030. The best checkpoint is best_s1.pt. Analysis: cRT hurt because re-initializing the classifier loses learned representations. The Stage 1 model with balanced softmax + EMA should outperform the previous eval of 0.8036. Decision: Submit eval with best_s1.pt to get a proper test score for the balanced softmax model.
